requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 dangerous-goods transport and Philippine handling
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3 运输与菲律宾危险品处理
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3 運輸與菲律賓危險品處理

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are dangerous goods in international transport. Philippine-bound shipments should carry a valid UN 38.3 test summary, and logistics documentation must be aligned with carrier and destination handling expectations for air and sea movement. For practical planning, destination handling often uses Manila South Harbor, Subic, or other Philippine entry points with local dangerous-goods coordination.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源属于危险品国际运输。面向菲律宾的货物通常需具备有效 UN 38.3 测试摘要，并按空运与海运要求提供目的地承运人与监管方可接受的文件。实际执行中应结合马尼拉南港、苏比克等入境点进行危险品协调。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源屬於危險品國際運輸。面向菲律賓的貨物通常需具備有效 UN 38.3 測試摘要，並按空運與海運要求提供目的地承運人與監管方可接受的文件。實際執行中應結合馬尼拉南港、蘇比克等入境點進行危險品協調。

standards_or_laws: UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III section 38.3
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations for air transport
IMDG Code and IMO dangerous-goods handling rules for sea transport

summary.en: China exports generally require equivalent UN 38.3 transport safety documentation and applies the same class-based dangerous-goods frameworks for logistics. Therefore, test methodology is mostly harmonized. Implementation differences are mostly in destination paper flow, packaging marking language, and terminal coordination at destination entry points.
summary.zh: 中国出口通常也要求 UN 38.3 运输安全文件，并按同类危险品物流框架执行。因此测试方法大多一致。差异主要在目的地文件流程、包装标识语言、以及目的港口与终端协调。
summary.zht: 中國出口通常也要求 UN 38.3 運輸安全文件，並按同類危險品物流框架執行。因此測試方法大多一致。差異主要在目的地文件流程、包裝標識語言，以及目的港口與終端協調。

standards_or_laws: China dangerous-goods logistics implementation based on international UN, IMO, and IATA aligned handling
Chinese export logistics and documentation requirements
No standalone China-to-Philippines transport exemption from UN 38.3

gap.en: Transport methodology is mostly shared, so the exporter-side technical gap is narrow. The practical gap is ensuring Philippine-side acceptance and terminal handling arrangements for each route and shipment schedule at the destination entry point.
gap.zh: 运输方法本身通常一致，出口端技术差距有限。实际差距在于确保菲律宾侧文件接收和装卸流程。
gap.zht: 運輸方法本身通常一致，出口端技術差距有限。實際差距在於確保菲律賓側文件接收和裝卸流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport safety documentation and for dangerous-goods movement by air or sea into the Philippines.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for international dangerous-goods movement under China export logistics compliance as applicable.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 obligations are largely harmonized and usually transferable across major shipping chains. For Philippine-bound movements, treat destination coordination at Manila and Subic as the real execution risk point.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3 要求在主要运输链路上通常高度一致，可基本复用。对菲律宾目的地而言，真正的执行风险在于马尼拉和苏比克等目的地港口（或机场）的现场协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3 要求在主要運輸鏈路上通常高度一致，可基本複用。對菲律賓目的地而言，真正的執行風險在於馬尼拉和蘇比克等目的地港口（或機場）的現場協調。
